rag_rules: Place AGREE assumptions and guarantees in component type annexes when they refer to visible ports and features.
Use visible identifiers from the AADL model to define assumptions and guarantees.
generic_rules: Use explicit type declarations in AGREE equations to match AADL data types.
Avoid using AADL property names directly in AGREE expressions.
Write range assumptions using named constants or visible variables.
Ensure that output guarantees relate visible inputs to visible outputs.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts must be enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks.
Assumptions and guarantees should reference valid component ports and features.
anti_patterns: Do not reference AADL properties like Compute_Execution_Time directly in AGREE expressions.
Do not use implementation-only subcomponent paths in component type contracts.
irrelevant_topics: AADL model fusion and component implementation binding details
